category_title: Students who seek business ownership and professional autonomy after previous unsuccessful placements
scenario_title: Career exploration and overcoming previous unsuccessful placements
minimal_context: Anne is working on her résumé, cover letter, and personalized placement learning plan during a classroom pre-placement orientation to prepare for the workplace.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: For our pre-placement orientation today, we need to make a résumé, make a cover letter, and develop a personalized placement learning plan.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: I know we don't immediately start the placement and have to make a résumé first. But I'm hesitant to write down a plan after my unsuccessful placement at the hair salon.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: What do you think you should write?

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: I just want to make sure I have an out. I like that I can try it and if I don't like it I can drop out.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Please continue filling out the learning plan.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: I can't figure out what my goals are. When I think about the hair salon, I just think 'Wow! I don't want to do this at all in my future.' I'm just focused on eliminating these as career options so I'm not wasting money in school later on.

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: For our pre-placement orientation today, we need to make a résumé, make a cover letter, and develop a personalized placement learning plan.

STUDENT: I know we don't immediately start the placement and have to make a résumé first. But I'm hesitant to write down a plan after my unsuccessful placement at the hair salon.

TUTOR: What do you think you should write?

STUDENT: I just want to make sure I have an out. I like that I can try it and if I don't like it I can drop out.

TUTOR: Please continue filling out the learning plan.

STUDENT: I can't figure out what my goals are. When I think about the hair salon, I just think 'Wow! I don't want to do this at all in my future.' I'm just focused on eliminating these as career options so I'm not wasting money in school later on.

task.content: Make a résumé, make a cover letter, and develop a personalized placement learning plan (PPLP)
task.learning_goal: Prepare for the workplace, learn about safety and job readiness

context.materials: Résumé, cover letter, personalized placement learning plan (PPLP)
context.social_setting: Classroom environment distinct from the community placement

challenging_behavior_trigger.condition: When reflecting on her previous unsuccessful placement in a hair salon
challenging_behavior_trigger.observable_behavior: Stressing the advantage of eliminating these as career options and not wasting money in school later on
challenging_behavior_trigger.internal_state: Wow! I don’t want to do this at all in my future
related_quotes: Wow! I don’t want to do this at all in my future
wasting money in school later on

behavior_patterns.condition: When considering committing to a new career path or placement
behavior_patterns.observable_behavior: Expressing relief at having an escape route if the placement is disliked
behavior_patterns.internal_state: Fear of being trapped in a career she doesn't want to do at all in her future
related_quotes: try it and if I don’t like it I can drop out
